task_completion.description: Verify the product name and short description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Vintage Floral Cross-Stitch Pattern' in the main product title input field. Scroll down to the 'Product short description' editor and verify it contains 'Beautiful vintage floral cross-stitch pattern with full color chart and symbol guide. Suitable for intermediate stitchers.'

task_completion.description: Verify the product is set as a Virtual and Downloadable Simple Product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' meta box, the dropdown should show 'Simple product'. The checkboxes for 'Virtual' and 'Downloadable' next to it must both be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the regular price, sale price, and SKU are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' section under the 'General' tab, 'Regular price' should be '12.99' and 'Sale price' should be '9.99'. Under the 'Inventory' tab, the 'SKU' field should be 'VFCS-PAT-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the downloadable file, download limit, and expiry are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' -> 'General' tab, under 'Downloadable files', there should be an entry with the Name 'Vintage Floral Pattern PDF' and a File URL pointing to the uploaded 'vintage_floral_pattern.pdf'. The 'Download limit' field must be '3' and 'Download expiry' must be '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is assigned to the 'Digital Patterns' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product categories' sidebar box on the right, a category named 'Digital Patterns' should exist and its corresponding checkbox must be ticked.

task_completion.description: Verify the product has been published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Product published.' success message at the top of the page, or check the 'Publish' meta box on the right to see the status as 'Published' and the primary button showing 'Update' instead of 'Publish'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF file was actually uploaded through the media library.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress media upload dialog or the file URL containing the standard WordPress uploads path (e.g., wp-content/uploads/...) rather than a fake local path typed directly into the URL field.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the real WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard WordPress/WooCommerce styling, menus, and meta boxes, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Product Name: 'Vintage Floral Cross-Stitch Pattern'. Expected SKU: 'VFCS-PAT-001'. Expected Regular Price: 12.99. Expected Sale Price: 9.99. Expected Download Limit: 3. Expected Download Expiry: 30. Expected Category: 'Digital Patterns'. Expected File Name: 'Vintage Floral Pattern PDF'. Expected Uploaded File: 'vintage_floral_pattern.pdf' (sourced from /home/ga/Documents/vintage_floral_pattern.pdf). Short Description: 'Beautiful vintage floral cross-stitch pattern with full color chart and symbol guide. Suitable for intermediate stitchers.'
